Estimate    Actual  Operator
       -         1  PROJECT a1, a2
       -         1  AGGREGATE COUNT(o_orderkey) AS a1, COUNT(a5) AS a2
       -   1500000  PROJECT o_orderkey, c_custkey
       -   1500000  PROJECT o_orderkey, a5
       -   1500000  LEFT OUTER JOIN HASH ON PROJECTION_684.o_custkey = PROJECTION_681.c_custkey
       -    150000  │└PROJECT c_custkey, c_custkey AS a5
       -    150000  │ PROJECT c_custkey

       -   1500000  PROJECT o_custkey, o_orderkey

queries.sql:
SELECT COUNT(o.o_orderkey), COUNT(c.c_custkey)
FROM tpch_sf1.orders AS o
LEFT JOIN tpch_sf1.customer AS c
  ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey;

theorem.description: Count rows after LEFT JOIN from ORDERS to CUSTOMER
theorem.name: PLAN_JOIN_CHECK-LEFT-ORDERS-CUSTOMER
